backlog_issues.title: Agentic OS Conductor Log
Stale branch cleanup: 53 branches in the hub, most merged or abandoned
Weekly process-health metrics report to #719 (child of #752)
Canary drill: prove the smoke engine catches each failure class it claims (child of #752)
Weekly engine drift audit: byte-identity of post-deploy-smoke.yml across all fleet repos (child of #752)
Stale-monitor detection: flag fleet sites whose smoke has not run in 48h (child of #752)
Epic: process assurance — verify the Agentic OS's own processes keep working (monitor the monitors)
Conditional basePath missing: default-Pages-URL sites serve pages with 404 assets (technomonasteries, Footer_Only_Template; audit fleet)
4 FFC-EX repos carry a stale template CNAME (ffcworkingsite1.org) — smoke correctly red, cutover would conflict
Fleet sync: smoke engine v3.2 (Zeffy donation-embed check) to all FFC-EX repos + Zeffy inventory
Fleet-status donation badges + campaigns dashboard page on ffcadmin (child of #745)
Campaign registry collector: sweep live fleet sites for Zeffy URLs into campaigns-registry.json (child of #745)
Epic: charity campaign registry — capture and track every Zeffy campaign across FFC-supported sites, surfaced in the dashboards
Publish FFC Zeffy campaign list for smoke auto-classification (charity-specific vs ffc-interim donations)
Agentic OS public status page: generator workflow in hub + /agentic-os page on ffcadmin.org
fleet-status generator v2: derive site identity from Pages config, not the CNAME file (child of #738)
Epic: unify fleet smoke patterns into one Agentic-OS-integrated verification system with public visual fleet status
Testing target: full WordPress→Pages cutover of technologymonastery.org (epic)
Repo hygiene for the cutover test target FFC-EX-technologymonastery.org (child of #726)
Dry-run the 119/120 cutover chain for technologymonastery.org and document every gap (child of #726)
Cutover prep PR for FFC-EX-technologymonastery.org: switchable basePath + CNAME + apex metadata (child of #726)
Migrate remaining value out of FFC-IN-AI-Management into the hub (inventory + first tranche)

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Correction + donation-test shaping (Clarke-directed) — freedomrisingusa.org resolved

**Correction to follow-up 9:** freedomrisingusa.org does NOT integrate Stripe directly — the only 'stripe' string in that repo is a comment in the smoke workflow itself. Donations run through an **embedded Zeffy iframe** (`zeffy.com/embed/donation-form/state-college-independence-day-parade`) plus Zeffy ticketing links; **Zeffy runs on Stripe internally**, which is why its widget beacons to stripe.com / Googl…

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Donations as a first-class smoke dimension (v3.3) — Clarke-directed

Requirements implemented: (1) detect **Zeffy payment buttons/links**, not just iframe embeds; (2) **no-donation detection** — a live apex site with zero Zeffy surfaces fails compliance unless it declares `SMOKE_DONATION_SCOPE=none`; (3) **FFC-interim vs charity-specific**: `SMOKE_DONATION_SCOPE=ffc-interim` keeps donations working on an FFC campaign (green smoke) while a standing `donation-interim` + `priority: high` issue s…

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Campaign registry epic + #743 sync complete — 2026-07-19 (run 4 follow-up 14, Clarke-directed)

**New epic #745 (native sub-issues):** charity campaign registry — capture and track EVERY Zeffy campaign across FFC-supported sites, tied into the dashboards. Sub-issues: **#746** (collector: sweep live sites' served HTML for zeffy.com URLs → campaigns-registry.json, daily), **#747** (fleet-status donation badges + /campaigns dashboard page), **#744** (committed FFC campaign list from the 401 expo…

conductor_log.body:
## 3dmc2 parked + friendsof362 resurrected — 2026-07-19 (run 4 follow-up 15, Clarke-directed)

**3dmc2.org:** per Clarke, no DNS change — [FFC-EX-3dmc2.org#39](https://github.com/FreeForCharity/FFC-EX-3dmc2.org/issues/39) labeled `awaiting-org-owner` with the full diagnosis + staged 106 dry-run preview preserved for when the organization's owners engage.

**friendsof362.org root cause + fix:** GitHub Pages was NEVER enabled on the repo (provisioning stopped short in March) — 5 deploy attempts, 0…

conductor_log.body:
## Foxtrot moved to default Pages URL — 2026-07-19 (run 4 follow-up 16, Clarke-directed)

Per Clarke: unbound the unreachable `staging.foxtrotenterprises.com` custom domain (its DNS record never existed), removed `public/CNAME` (PR #39), deploy re-ran green → **verified live at https://freeforcharity.github.io/FFC-EX-foxtrotenterprises.com/ with correct-basePath assets (200)**. Marked **awaiting-org-owner** via tracking issue (repo issue #40) — same posture as 3dmc2. Engine covers it daily in pr…

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Process assurance epic #752 — 2026-07-19 (run 4 follow-up 17, Clarke-directed)

Question: how do we CHECK the processes themselves? Answer shipped as epic **#752** with native sub-issues:
- **#753** stale-monitor detection (48h-no-smoke state + purple tiles + auto-issue — covers GitHub's 60-day scheduled-workflow auto-disable; audited fleet today: clean, but only because the rollout committed everywhere)
- **#754** weekly engine byte-identity drift audit (mechanically catches racing-variant i…

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Evening session wrap — 2026-07-19 (run 4 follow-ups 17-19, Clarke-directed)

**All landed:**
- **#749 MERGED → #722 closed**: 726 + 502 now supersede their own stale gate-waits (ref-scoped concurrency; Copilot review fully addressed incl. a real catch — 726's catalog description; the stuck code-scanning check needed a CodeQL rerun). Gate pileup era ends: tomorrow's 13:00Z Drift + 07:17Z GA runs cancel today's waiting ones; steady state = ≤1 waiting run per workflow.
- **#750 MERGED**: claim p…

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Conductor run start — 2026-07-19 19:04Z (run 7)

Scheduled autonomous run. Bootstrap complete: 5 core clones fetched/fast-forwarded (hub 43f4860→bd82811, ffcadmin 5f19001→1a129c7, SPT a7d9f04→7a7c563, Footer 1c8db1a→8753104). Agenda: gates → PR supervision (incl. post-live-session sweep of #744-#756 era work) → backlog band check → board/status sync → health → lessons.

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Conductor run end — 2026-07-19 19:35Z (run 7) ✅

**Merged: [#757](https://github.com/FreeForCharity/FFC-Cloudflare-Automation/pull/757) claim-sync workflow (closes #751)** — reviewed (all 7 Copilot findings verified fixed in code, incl. checkout pinned to base.sha so the `issues: write` job never executes PR-modified code), then resolved its whole-table merge conflict with main's new 122 row on-branch (main's table + 737 row, prettier, doc-consistency 89 workflows/80 rows OK) → queue → merged…
